feed.title: Somerset County Probate Court
feed.subtitle: No probate-specific news/RSS feed exists at any of the 16 counties; monitored by full-page fingerprint of the official probate court page. Purely descriptive/static page (mission statement, services, contact); low expected change frequency.

entry.title: Page updated: Somerset County Probate Court
entry.content: This page's content changed since the last check. No structured items could be extracted automatically; visit the page directly to review the update.
